prompt: Read the three text files in ~/Desktop/kinbench/311-sources/ (a.txt, b.txt, c.txt). Concatenate their contents in order (a, then b, then c) and create a new Pages document at ~/Desktop/kinbench/311-merged.pages with the combined text as the body. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/311-merge-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
